title: Grow a Garden
body:
## Find Islands![Islands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/30c5ca17616fd4ae428cba05491b6402339ce1f2_0.webp)
Each Island has decorations on top of it that fit the biome!
## Buy seeds![Seed Shop](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6eb382df5849ee445ba64ebcd5a9de1278624e88_0.webp)
Every Island has preleveled villagers to get you started on gardening!
## Plant seeds (onto dirt)![Plant Seeds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed5404bc41997c1a0c55fe4b1d141d4612e42733.png)
Now wait...
## Sell plants![Sell Stuff](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8ea68be6743fe8fe0022b718c794bc6c59fa1a2.png)
To gain more Sheckles!
## AND REPEAT!
# Mod currently includes:
## Seeds/Plants:
![Every Seed/Plant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88c91a9a0d8aa65cf862f79ee3c9f53bf7728b64.png)

Every plant costs a little bit more than the one before it, all plants can have 2 mutations: Either nothing, Huge or a plant-specific mutation, which is either from the game or completely my idea.
### Every plant and their plant-specific mutation
- Carrot [Rainbow]
- Strawberry [Gold]
- Blueberry [Bloodgrown]
- Orange Tulip [Shocked] (I hate its texture so it is probably going to get changed later)
- Tomato [Infected]
- Corn [Choc] (Its seed id only obtainable once every Small Island!)
## Gears:
![Every Gear](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6f7ce47dcbe0328442ecccc7db7d3a001770f96.png)

Gears can be bought at the gear shop and help you in your gardening journey.
Every gear explained
- (Basic) Sprinkler: Speeds up the growth speed of plants that are 2 blocks above it. (currently only works with plants lower level than corn)
- Advanced Sprinkler: Turns fully grown plants into Huge mutation, if said plant is 4 blocks above it. (currently only works with plants lower level than corn)
- Reclaimer: Place on any plant to get it back as a seed. (currently only works with plants lower level than corn)
